---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: gurjarchetan
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `syswatch ...`
2. Navigate to tab ...
3. See error / unexpected behaviour

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error output, panics, or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| SysWatch version | `syswatch --version` |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Kernel | `uname -r` |
| Terminal emulator | e.g. GNOME Terminal, iTerm2, kitty |
| Terminal size | e.g. 220×50 |

## Additional context

Any other context, logs, or relevant information.
